name: frontend
comment_version: Non-authoritative — the real version is git-tag-derived at build time (APP_VERSION) and inlined as PUBLIC_UI_VERSION by vite.config.ts. This sentinel is only the fallback for a build with no APP_VERSION. See RELEASING.md.

scripts.prepare: (pnpm run paraglide || echo 'skip: project files not present yet') && (svelte-kit sync || echo '')
scripts.check: pnpm run paraglide && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: pnpm run paraglide && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
